theme.title: Future and Conditional
theme.description: Learn how to talk about the future and hypothetical situations

lesson.title: Future and Conditional Review
lesson.instructions: Translate mixed future and conditional sentences with more context

exercises.prompt: If we left earlier tomorrow, we would arrive before the meeting begins.
exercises.answer: Si saliéramos más temprano mañana, llegaríamos antes de que empiece la reunión.
exercises.explanation: mixed future time reference and conditional result

exercises.prompt: Next year she will study engineering, although she would rather study design.
exercises.answer: El próximo año ella estudiará ingeniería, aunque preferiría estudiar diseño.

exercises.prompt: I would lend you my car this weekend if I did not need it for work.
exercises.answer: Te prestaría mi coche este fin de semana si no lo necesitara para el trabajo.
exercises.explanation: conditional with object pronoun and reason

exercises.prompt: They will probably postpone the event because several guests will arrive late.
exercises.answer: Probablemente pospondrán el evento porque varios invitados llegarán tarde.

exercises.prompt: Would you accept the offer if the salary included health insurance?
exercises.answer: ¿Aceptarías la oferta si el salario incluyera seguro médico?
exercises.explanation: conditional question with a detailed condition

exercises.prompt: When the guests arrive, we will serve dinner in the garden if the weather is good.
exercises.answer: Cuando lleguen los invitados, serviremos la cena en el jardín si hace buen tiempo.
exercises.explanation: future with time and condition clauses

exercises.prompt: My sister would feel less stressed if she slept eight hours every night.
exercises.answer: Mi hermana se sentiría menos estresada si durmiera ocho horas cada noche.

exercises.prompt: We will send the final version as soon as the client confirms the changes.
exercises.answer: Enviaremos la versión final en cuanto el cliente confirme los cambios.

exercises.prompt: If I were you, I would wait a few days before making such an important decision.
exercises.answer: Si yo fuera tú, esperaría unos días antes de tomar una decisión tan importante.

exercises.prompt: After we finish this course, we will be able to speak with more confidence.
exercises.answer: Después de que terminemos este curso, podremos hablar con más confianza.
